saas.title: Product Engineering
saas.description: We act as your CTO-on-demand. From architectural planning to MVP execution, we build scalable software products designed to attract capital and dominate markets.

hero.subtext: We engineer the digital infrastructure that enables visionary companies to lead their industries.

mission.p1: PRISM was founded on a singular premise: world-class engineering talent should be accessible to anyone with a vision, regardless of geography. We've built an elite, distributed team of architects and designers who operate with the technical rigour of a top-tier product company.
mission.p2: Whether we're scaling a startup's first platform or re-architecting legacy enterprise systems, our commitment to technical excellence remains absolute. We do not compromise on quality.

alex.bio: Ex-Google architect with 12+ years in large-scale system engineering. Believes software is 80% architecture, 20% code.

sara.bio: Former lead designer at a Series B fintech. Obsessed with the junction of high-fidelity design and human logic.

james.bio: Infrastructure specialist turned product engineer. Built systems handling over 10M daily transactions.

mia.bio: Ensures every project is delivered with surgical precision, on budget, and ahead of the roadmap.

engineering.title: Engineering First
engineering.desc: We don't ship fast — we ship right. Every move is proctored by technical excellence, not convenience.

transparency.title: Total Visibility
transparency.desc: No black boxes. We work as an extension of your team with absolute visibility into our process and logic.

outcomes.title: Outcomes Over Output
outcomes.desc: Code is just the means. The end is measurable business impact — revenue, velocity, and market share.

Contact.subtext: Have a vision or a challenge? Our team of engineers is ready to help you architect the solution.

cta.subtext: Submit your project brief and receive a technical proposal within 24 hours. Precision-scoped, data-driven roadmaps for your vision.

hero.subtext: Precision scoping. Zero hidden fees. Every partnership is priced relative to the complexity and impact of the engineering effort.

Pricing.note: All economics are based on a baseline complexity analysis. Final quotes follow a discovery phase.

addons.subtext: Extend your platform's capabilities with targeted modules.

0.q: What is your standard delivery timeline?
0.a: High-performance platforms: 3-7 days. Telegram ecosystems: 1-2 weeks. Full-scale enterprise CRM or SaaS: 3-8 weeks, depending on architectural complexity.

1.q: What is the capital allocation structure?
1.a: We operate on a 50% initiation deposit and 50% upon successful delivery. Milestone-based allocation is available for larger enterprise efforts.

2.q: Do we retain IP and code ownership?
2.a: Yes, 100%. Upon finalization of the partnership, all source code and intellectual property belong to you.

3.q: How do you handle post-launch iterations?
3.a: All partnerships include a post-launch stabilization period. Further feature engineering is scoped and quoted independently.

4.q: Do you partner with international clients?
4.a: Absolutely. We operate a global engineering studio and accept international capital transfers across all major currencies.

1.title: 1. Scope
1.p: PRISM IT Studio is dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of data integrity. This policy outlines our protocols for information processing.

2.title: 2. Data Acquisition
2.p: We may process the following categories of data:
list: Identification Data: Name, business email, and phone coordinates.
Telemetry Data: Anonymous usage patterns and technical device diagnostics.
Engagement Data: Technical briefs and partnership communications.

4.title: 4. Data Sovereignty
4.p: We never sell or trade your information. Data is only shared with trusted infrastructure providers necessary for our core operations.

5.title: 5. Cookie Protocols
5.p: We use minimal functional cookies for performance telemetry. We do not engage in behavioral tracking or ad-retargeting.

6.title: 6. Infrastructure Security
6.p: We employ enterprise-grade security protocols including absolute HTTPS encryption and secure input validation.

8.title: 8. Contact
8.p: For compliance inquiries, please contact our legal desk:

1.title: 1. Agreement
1.p: Engaging with PRISM IT Studio implies agreement to these engineering-standard terms.

2.title: 2. Services
2.p: We provide specialized product engineering across web, Telegram, and enterprise automation sectors.

3.title: 3. Economics
list: Standard partnerships require a 50% initiation fee.
IP transfer occurs upon capital finalization.

4.title: 4. IP Ownership
4.p: Upon final capital allocation, all custom source code belongs to the partner. We retain rights to our proprietary base frameworks.

6.title: 6. Liability Boundaries
6.p: Total liability is capped at the capital allocated for the specific project milestone.

7.title: 7. Non-Disclosure
7.p: Both parties are bound by strict non-disclosure protocols regarding proprietary architecture and logic.

8.title: 8. Jurisdiction
8.p: Governed by the legal framework of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Disputes resolved through expert arbitration.

9.title: 9. Inquiry
9.p: For term clarification, contact our studio desk:
